scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace worker
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace frontend && npm run test --workspace worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace worker
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run config:check:deploy && npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace worker
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build --workspace frontend && cd frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=meno
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run config:check:deploy && npm run build --workspace worker && cd worker && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.local.toml
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && npm run deploy:frontend && npm run deploy:worker
